case_title: LEO RA VS. ANTHONY DELEON et al

docket_entries.description: LAW AND MOTION 302, WILLIAM C. SPAIN, ESQ. MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL (FOR PLAINTIFF LEO RA) IS GRANTED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

NO APPEARANCE, NOR OBJECTION FILED. CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING MAR-17-2011 AT 10:30AM. THE COURT FINDS NO GOOD CAUSE OR SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE PREVIOUS COURT ORDERS. A LESS SEVERE SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE DUE TO THE HISTORY OF LACK OF COMPLIANCE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

calendar.matters:
MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-17-2011 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Order to Show Cause to Self-represented Plaintiff for failure to Prosecute Case is scheduled this day. The court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substantial justification for plaintiff's failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Therefore, it is hereby ordered that this matter be dismissed. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Proceedings not reported. (610)

CONT. ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-03-2011 Set For Order To Show Cause On Mar-17-11 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CONT. ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-28-2010 Continued To Feb-08-11 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Self-represented plaintiff is sanctioned $250.00 for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 2/8/2011 at 1:30 PM in Department 610. Proceedings not reported. (212)

CONT. ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-20-2010 Continued To Dec-28-10 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-05-2010 Continued To Aug-24-10 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

Notice Of Motion For Order Compelling Pltf To Answer Form Interrogatories And Special Interrogaoties, And Resond To Demand For Production And Inspection Of Documents; Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Feb-24-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances, tentative ruling is adopted. DEFENDANT ANTHONY DELEON's Motion To Compel Plaintiff's Responses To Form Interrogatories and Special Interrogatories, to Respond To Demand For Production And Inspection Of Documents is granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Plaintiff is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded in the amount of $640, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Commissioner Everett A. Hewlett. Not reported.

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Sep-28-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: WILLIAM C. SPAIN, ESQ. MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL (FOR PLAINTIFF LEO RA).
APPEARANCES: William C. Spain, Esq. 510/839-9890 moving to be relieved as counsel for pltf; no other appearances.
RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling - Granted. Order signed in open court. (302/CWW) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797
